summary: Multi-tenant data-isolation audit verified end-to-end. Backend: 15/15 pytests pass (retired endpoints return 410, /api/event-types requires member token, Families A/B/C cannot see each other's event types, events, members, wall notes, kids-money, or budget rows, diag/tenant works for admin and 403s for non-admin). Frontend: purgeAllFamilyCaches() correctly scrubs all legacy keys (mfml_cache_events, mfml_cache_event_types, family_locations_latest, wall_outbox, wall_cache:*) AND foreign-family-scoped keys (mfml_cache:fam:<other_id>:*) during the auth lifecycle when Family B logs in after Family A. /time-plan rendered for Family B is clean (no KVD, Morning Dienst, or cached note leakage). Language switching EN<->DE<->AR still works with proper RTL flip for Arabic.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2912 lines - exceeds 700-line guideline. Continue extracting feature routers (kids-money, wall, budget) into separate modules to keep tenant-scoping uniformly enforced.

On the Login screen, the Family Account login form testids are 'login-email', 'login-password', 'login-submit' (NOT 'login-email-input', 'login-password-input', 'login-submit-btn' as referenced in some test guidance). Either align testids to the documented '-input/-btn' suffix OR update internal QA docs - inconsistency will confuse future testing agents.
test_credentials: Three families freshly registered per run via /api/auth/register with timestamps (qa-iso-A/B/C-<ts>@example.com, Pass1234!, PIN 1234). No persistent test creds needed.
seed_data_creation: TEST_FamilyA/B/C with members Alice/Bob/Charlie, Family A also has event_type 'KVD', event 'Morning Dienst' on 2026-02-15, a wall note 'FamilyA-secret-note', and an extra non-admin kid member 'AliceKidNoAdmin'. All test data is namespaced; cleanup not performed (TEST_ prefix preserved).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend isolation regression lives in /app/backend/tests/test_tenant_isolation.py - run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL set. The register payload requires confirm_password + accepted_beta_terms/accepted_privacy_policy/accepted_disclaimer (NOT accept_beta/etc). First family member is added with ACCOUNT token (bootstrap), subsequent members require a member token with fadmin=true. Frontend login testids are 'login-email', 'login-password', 'login-submit' (no -input/-btn suffix). On /login the 'Family Account' card (data-testid=pick-family) must be clicked before the email/password form appears. purgeAllFamilyCaches verified to remove mfml_cache_events, mfml_cache_event_types, family_locations_latest, wall_outbox, wall_cache:*, and mfml_cache:fam:<otherFamilyId>:* keys.
rca of the issue: Original leak vectors closed: (1) seed_users startup hook removed - no more cross-tenant seed admins; (2) /api/users and /api/auth/verify return 410 - retired shared endpoints can no longer be abused for tenant traversal; (3) /api/event-types now mandates require_member_token returning 401 unauth - eliminates silent scoping onto stale family context; (4) frontend cache keys re-namespaced by family_id with purgeAllFamilyCaches() called inside auth.register/login/logout - guarantees no carry-over of Family A's localStorage into Family B's session; (5) /api/diag/tenant exposes orphan-record visibility (currently 0 across all collections) for ongoing monitoring. All three test families verified to have zero cross-visibility.
